author: Alexa Blay
title: How to Bake Eggs
ingredients: Oil or butter to grease the pan
instructions_list: Lightly grease the non-stick muffin pan with oil, butter, or spray oil.
Crack each egg into one of the muffin openings.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Bake for 14-17 minutes, or until the whites don’t jiggle and the yolks reach your desired level of doneness (the ones in the photo were baked for 14 minutes).
description: Baking eggs in a muffin tin is the easiest way to streamline your breakfast meal prep! Once you know how to bake eggs, you'll be amazed at how easy it is!
